title: ドキッ☆ワイルド王子と遭遇！？

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, what amazing weather! Perfect for
observing my cute little Umas. ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...Gasp! According to my sensors, there's an Horsegirl nearby! I must hurry to the source!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Siriuuus! Sirius, where are youuu?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I want nothing more than to go partner running
with you right now! I know you'll treat me to a real
thrashing! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, what's all this noise? ...Well, nothing
that concerns a princess, I'm sure.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now, it's time to start my special training! Mr.
Tree, it is time for your gracious beating.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Princess Smack! ☆
What the?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'd understand a beetle falling out of the tree, but
not a Sirius Symboli!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Can't say I've been mistaken for a beetle before.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Geez, just when I find a place to be alone, I'm
immediately ambushed.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, that's strange coming from you. You're
always the center of attention, so I thought you
preferred it that way.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes, even I need time to be alone and
think. So could you keep my hideout a secret?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
If not... I'll have to make sure you keep that
mouth of yours shut.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Gasp! What are you doing lifting my chin up so... so...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Focus—have you made your choice, my little
rambunctious princess?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: You... you...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: RUDE BUFFOON!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: You just... made a giant hole in the wall...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ack! I've gone and done it again!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Pleeease, teachers, forgive me! I'll write an
apology letter right this minute!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Heh... Ha ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: You're an interesting one, Kawakami Princess.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hyaaaskfdf?! The chuckle, the suave way she said
"interesting"—she's so coool!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Th-this memory is going right in my precious
archives of Tracen Acade—gurk!
